Teach. Inspire. Grow.

Are you a passionate educator looking for a stable, rewarding teaching opportunity in a supportive academic environment?

Atlantic Five-Star English is now hiring Full-time IELTS Teachers to join our public-school programme in Hanoi for the 2026–2027 academic year.

At Atlantic Five-Star English, we offer more than just a teaching job — we provide a structured, professional environment where you can develop your career, enjoy consistent daytime hours, and make a meaningful impact on young learners in Vietnam's public school system

What you'll be doing


Teach IELTS / Academic English to high school students (ages 15–18)
Deliver engaging lessons covering speaking, listening, reading & writing
Prepare students for IELTS and other standardised exams
Track student progress & provide feedback through assessments
Collaborate with Academic & Operations teams to ensure smooth delivery
Participate in school activities, workshops & professional development
You'll be teaching in real classrooms, making real impact — not just test prep.



Working schedule


60 teaching hours/month (guaranteed)
Classes: Daytime hours
Teaching at public schools across Hanoi



What you'll get


Up to 730,000 VND/hour (gross) + IELTS supplement
Completion bonus based on performance
Private health insurance
Visa & Work Permit fully supported
Relocation allowance (for overseas hires)
Travel allowance for schools from 9km
Ongoing professional development & training
Up to 20 days paid leave + public holidays



Who we're looking for


Bachelor's degree + CELTA/Trinity TESOL (or equivalent)
At least 2-year teaching experience (teenagers)
Proven experience teaching IELTS / TOEFL / Academic English
Strong classroom management and effective communication skills
A genuine passion for working with teenage students (15–18)
Experience teaching in Vietnamese public schools is highly preferred
Clean criminal record



Why Atlantic?


Stable public-school programme since 2015
Structured curriculum + strong academic support
Real classroom impact with large student groups
Professional environment with continuous development



How to Apply


send your CV and supporting documents to our recruitment email.
Atlantic follows strict safeguarding practices. All candidates are screened in line with child protection policies.
Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a short pre-interview task demonstrating their approach to lesson planning and teaching methodolog

Atlantic Teacher Careers  Hanoi, Hanoi, Vietnam
1 month ago  63 applicants
  

See who Atlantic Teacher Careers has hired for this role

Apply 
Save
New Open Jobs

[HANOI] Full-time High school/IELTS Teachers needed for our in-school teaching team

Atlantic Five-Star English is recruiting Full-time High school/IELTS Teachers to join our in-school teaching team for the 2024-2025 school year.

This post is ideal for an experienced, dedicated teacher looking for long-term, daytime hours teaching students aged 15-18.

Schools are mainly located in Hanoi. Travel allowances are provided for certain schools that are more than 9kms from the centre of Hanoi.

Courses start in September and will continue to the end of the school year in May 2025. Teachers will be required to attend an induction week before the start of classes.


Summer classes are available for 8 weeks around June-August


Course Info

Class size:


approximately 25 – 30 students for normal sized classes
bigger size classes with more than 30 students will attract a supplementary allowance


Contract Length


Aug/Sep 2024 – May 2025


Teaching Hours


Teachers may be scheduled to teach between the hours of 7am to 6pm, Mon to Fri
guaranteed minimum of 60 hours per month for full-time teachers
we also have a reduced FT contract with less hours for teachers who prefer a lighter schedule


Compensation


from 580,000VND gross per teaching hour (based on qualifications and experience) + allowances


Benefits For Full-time Teachers


Paid induction
Performance-based completion bonus
Travel allowance for schools outside central districts
Relocation allowance for overseas hires
Visa & work permit covered
Private health insurance covered
On-going professional development
Up to 20 days paid annual leave and public holidays


We offer dedicated academic management support, including teacher mentorship and developmental observations.

DUTIES

5SiS teachers are responsible for planning and teaching lessons, managing student behaviour, and keeping detailed records of their progress. This involves grading tests and completing comments and records to communicate student performance with schools and parents. Travelling to schools, regular communication with the academic and operations teams, and attending meetings and training sessions are key parts of the role. A High School-IELTS teacher requires a dedication to helping students (aged 15-18) expand their knowledge of a new language and structures and how to use them. It is important to keep abreast of current events and incorporating these events and themes into lessons to make them more relevant and engaging to students. Teachers should have compassion, understanding, and excellent communication and interpersonal skills to effectively instruct students aged 15-18.

Essential

ROLE REQUIREMENTS:


C

ISMART EDUCATION is looking for 5 native English teachers to start in the public primary and secondary school in Can Tho city with fully facilitates for new academic year (starting from this September). iSMART is an English learning program through Maths, Science and General English. iSMART education is a leader in allowing students to experience a modern class environment which includes digital learning resources and interactive lessons. An immersive approach is offered with the iSMART program through a stimulating environment instead of passive learning. Our courses allow students to build their own vocabulary, improve their 4 English skills and enhance their critical thinking

TEFL/TESOL/CELTA/DELTA certification

Valid Visa/TRC (advantageous if in Can Tho city)
Notarized degree & ESL certificate
Professional, dynamic, passionate

Full-time Public School Teachers in Ho Chi Minh | APPLY NOW!

Am I a good fit for this job?
Tailor my resume
This Summer, ILA is hiring for positions in our Public School and Language Centre teaching programmes in Ho Chi Minh City!

Locations: In Ho Chi Minh City at our ILA Go Vap centre.

WHY ILA?

ILA is one of the largest International Language Providers in Vietnam, with over 25 years of experience in the education industry and a diverse team of 700+ qualified expatriate teachers working at 60+ Language Centres across the country. At ILA, teachers have the opportunity to teach students across a wide range of age groups and abilities. We take pride in the Training and Support we offer our teachers, giving them the opportunity to develop their teaching skills and advance their career.

ILA Vietnam teaches more than 40,000 students a year ranging from beginners (inclusive of both Young Learners and Adults) to advanced level students including IELTS, TOEFL and Academic English. We also work closely with a number of partner schools and NGOs, as well as providing additional Mathematics classes in our award winning language centres, thus providing a wide range of options to each of our teachers and staff. We have small class sizes and all the support and resources a teacher could wish for, including dedicated support throughout the Visa & Work Permit application process for our international colleagues. Celebrated as a recipient of HR Asia Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) Awards in 2023, we have made remarkable efforts in fostering an outstanding work environment that values and respects every individual's unique perspectives, experiences, and backgrounds. We place a strong emphasis on academic quality, as reflected in our approach to teacher recruitment, development, support and management. Our teachers also have numerous opportunities to move up the corporate ladder in one of the Best Companies to Work for in Asia – as awarded by HR Asia in 2022 & 2023.

What We Offer


NEW Competitive hourly rate of up to 600,000 VND/hour for new teachers
Visa & Work permit organised and covered by ILA
Daytime Schedule for Public School Teaching
Premium Health Insurance
On-going professional development delivered by experienced Teaching & Learning team



What You Need


English proficiency level: Native
Minimum 3-year Bachelor's degree
A recognised qualification in English Language Teaching with a duration of 120+ hours (TEFL Level 4 Certificate or higher, AVSE TESOL, CELTA/Trinity, or equivalent)
Candidates with teaching practice/experience highly preferred.



Kindly

With a population of nearly 90 million people and a long-standing dedication to education as well as one of the world's fastest-growing economies, Vietnam hires thousands of foreign English teachers every year. This means that teaching jobs in Vietnam are plentiful with schools hiring year-round.

title: Secondary English Teacher (from Jan-2027)
location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
description:
Skip to main content

Secondary English Teacher (from Jan-2027)
Australian International School, Vietnam  Vietnam
10 hours ago   Be among the first 25 applicants
  

See who Australian International School, Vietnam has hired for this role

Apply 
Save
Use AI to assess how you fit

Get AI-powered advice on this job and more exclusive features.

Am I a good fit for this job?
Tailor my resume
ROLE SUMMARY:

Australian International School (AIS) Saigon, a renowned international, co-educational K-13 school in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, has been educating young men and women for more than 16 years.

We are seeking an experienced and dedicated Secondary English Teacher to deliver high-quality English language acquisition and English curriculum instruction. This dual-role position supports students in developing both academic English proficiency and advanced literacy skills required for success in secondary learning pathways, including the IGCSE and IB programmes.

All teachers at AIS are expected to effectively develop and deliver the curriculum in line with the Inspired Education Group’s expectations and meet Inspired teaching standards. AIS Saigon offers a competitive remuneration package, which includes accommodation allowance; flight allowance; and insurance. The school community is friendly, supportive, and welcoming. We place great pride in our ethos, and we value our staff and support their professional development. Vietnam and in particular Ho Chi Minh City is a vibrant place to live, with a rich culture. Teachers enjoy an excellent standard of living.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:


Use a range of instructional techniques and media consistent with available resources and student needs.
Develop, deliver, and assess English in the lower secondary, Cambridge IGCSE, and IB Diploma Programme.
Provide a positive learning environment for each student and inspire students to expand their understanding and enjoyment of the subject.
Differentiate instruction to meet the individual needs of each student to be socially and academically successful.
Organise and lead extra-curricular activities and student engagement in Science.
Use a variety of assessment methods to ensure student knowledge and understanding are appropriately recorded.
Ensure the required standards of classroom management and student behaviour are met.
Desirable: Supervise Extended Essay students for the IB Diploma and/or Community Service projects as required.


THE IDEAL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE:


A positive, child-centred individual with excellent communication skills.
Qualified teaching certificate/licensure appropriate for grade level and subject area.
Bachelor’s degree in English and Teaching Certification in English
Minimum of 3-5 years of experience working with students.
Experience in teaching IGCSE Cambridge and IB is desirable
Solid working knowledge of the concepts, activities, and techniques related to teaching English at the required le

location: Atlantic Teacher Careers  Hanoi Capital Region
description:

[Ha Noi] Atlantic Five-Star English- Full-Time Secondary Teachers - 2026-2027
Atlantic Teacher Careers  Hanoi Capital Region
1 month ago  27 applicants
  

See who Atlantic Teacher Careers has hired for this role

Apply 
Save
Life at Atlantic, Living in VietNam, New Open Jobs

[Ha Noi] Atlantic Five-Star English- Full-Time Secondary Teachers – 2026-2027

Are you a passionate and experienced educator seeking a long-term, rewarding teaching opportunity? Join us at Atlantic Five-Star English as a Full-Time Secondary Teacher for the 2026-2027 school year. This role is perfect for teachers looking to make a lasting impact on students aged 11-15 while enjoying daytime working hours in a vibrant and supportive environment.

Why Choose Us?


Locations: Schools primarily located in Hanoi, with travel allowances for schools more than 9 km from the city center.
Start Date: Courses begin in September 2026 and run through to May 2027.
Guaranteed Hours: A minimum of 60 teaching hours per month for full-time teachers.
Class Sizes: Typically, 25-30 students, with larger classes attracting additional allowances.
Competitive Compensation: up to 730,000 VND gross per hour depending on qualifications and teaching experience, with additional allowances for travel and larger classes
Our Comprehensive Benefits:
Visa and Work Permit: Fully covered.
Medical Insurance: Inpatient & outpatient coverage.
Paid Leave: Generous vacation days to ensure work-life balance.
Completion Bonus: A rewarding bonus upon successful completion of the contract.


We provide dedicated academic management support, including teacher mentorship and regular developmental observations to help you grow in your career.

Essential Requirements

What We’re Looking For:


EFL Teaching Certification: CELTA, Trinity CertTESOL, or equivalent.
Bachelor’s Degree or Higher.
At least 2 Years of Teaching Experience: Secondary teaching experience is highly preferred.
Cultural Awareness: Ability to adapt and work effectively in a Vietnamese state-school environment.
Clean Criminal Record: As part of our commitment to safeguarding.


Desirable Qualifications


Higher-Level Qualifications: Delta, DipTESOL, or a relevant Master’s degree with practical teaching components.
Experience Teaching in Vietnamese State Schools: An advantage.


How to Apply: If you meet the requirements and are ready to make a difference in the lives of young learners, we want to hear from you! Please send your CV, cover letter, and scans of your degree, teaching certificates, and passport page to recruitment@atlantic.edu.vn

Important Notes


We follow safe hiring practices and screen all candidates for safeguarding concerns.
Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a brief pre-interview task related to lesson planning and teaching methodology.


Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Join us at Atlantic Five-Star English, where your expertise will s
